Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer

Class SimpleSequents

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.SimpleSequents
public class SimpleSequents extends Object
Common protocol for creating and transforming simple sequents.
Since:
2.3
See Also:
  • ISimpleSequent

    • SimpleSequents

      private SimpleSequents()

  • Method Details

    • make

      public static ISimpleSequent make(Iterable<Predicate> hypotheses, Predicate goal, FormulaFactory factory, Object origin)
      Returns a new simple sequent created with the given predicates. All non-null predicates must be type-checked. Null predicates will be ignored.

      All predicates must have been built with the given formula factory.

      Parameters:
      hypotheses - sequent hypotheses, can be or contain null
      goal - sequent goal, can be null
      factory - formula factory for the given predicates
      origin - origin of the sequent
      Returns:
      a new simple sequent with the given hypotheses and goal
      Since:
      2.4

    • make

      public static ISimpleSequent make(Iterable<Predicate> hypotheses, Predicate goal, FormulaFactory factory)
      Returns a new simple sequent created with the given predicates. All non-null predicates must be type-checked. Null predicates will be ignored.

      All predicates must have been built with the given formula factory.

      Parameters:
      hypotheses - sequent hypotheses, can be or contain null
      goal - sequent goal, can be null
      factory - formula factory for the given predicates
      Returns:
      a new simple sequent with the given hypotheses and goal

    • make

      public static ISimpleSequent make(Predicate[] hypotheses, Predicate goal, FormulaFactory factory, Object origin)
      Returns a new simple sequent created with the given predicates. All non-null predicates must be type-checked. Null predicates will be ignored.
      Parameters:
      hypotheses - sequent hypotheses, can be or contain null
      goal - sequent goal, can be null
      factory - formula factory for the given predicates
      origin - the origin of the sequent
      Returns:
      a new simple sequent with the given hypotheses and goal
      Since:
      2.4

    • make

      public static ISimpleSequent make(Predicate[] hypotheses, Predicate goal, FormulaFactory factory)
      Returns a new simple sequent created with the given predicates. All non-null predicates must be type-checked. Null predicates will be ignored.

      All predicates must have been built with the given formula factory.

      Parameters:
      hypotheses - sequent hypotheses, can be or contain null
      goal - sequent goal, can be null
      factory - formula factory for the given predicates
      Returns:
      a new simple sequent with the given hypotheses and goal

    • makeTrackedPredicates

      private static List<TrackedPredicate> makeTrackedPredicates(Iterable<Predicate> hypotheses, Predicate goal, FormulaFactory factory)

    • checkFactory

      private static void checkFactory(Predicate hyp, FormulaFactory factory)

    • getTrivial

      private static TrackedPredicate getTrivial(List<TrackedPredicate> preds)

    • simplify

      public static ISimpleSequent simplify(ISimpleSequent sequent, SimpleSequents.SimplificationOption... options)
      Simplifies logically the given sequent. The returned sequent is equivalent to the input sequent, albeit possibly simpler.

      The simplification is performed by applying to each predicate of the sequent the simplifier obtained from PredicateTransformers.makeSimplifier(SimplificationOption...) .

      Parameters:
      sequent - sequent to simplify
      options - simplification options
      Returns:
      a simplified sequent equivalent to the given one

    • filterLanguage

      public static ISimpleSequent filterLanguage(ISimpleSequent sequent, int... tags)
      Filters the given sequent by removing all predicates that contain a mathematical extension or an operator with one of the given tags.

      Predicates that contain a mathematical extension are predicates that contain either an extended expression, or an extended predicate operator, or an expression whose type contains a parametric type.

      The result sequent is associated to the default formula factory, rather than the formula factory of the original sequent to reflect the language restriction enforced by this filter.

      Parameters:
      sequent - sequent to simplify
      tags - tags of additional core operators to filter out
      Returns:
      a sequent stronger than the given one, restricted to the core mathematical language and that do not contain the given operators
      See Also:
      • FormulaFactory.getDefault()

    • translateDatatypes

      public static ISimpleSequent translateDatatypes(ISimpleSequent sequent)
      Translates the datatypes that occur in the given sequent to pure set theory.

      The result sequent is associated to the formula factory obtained from the original sequent after all datatype extensions have been removed. Any other mathematical extension is retained.

      Parameters:
      sequent - sequent to translate
      Returns:
      a sequent equivalent to the given one, where all datatypes have been translated to pure set theory
      Since:
      2.6
      See Also:
      • Formula.translateDatatype(org.eventb.core.ast.IDatatypeTranslation)

    • translateExtensions

      public static ISimpleSequent translateExtensions(ISimpleSequent sequent)
      Translates the operators and then the datatypes that occur in the given sequent to pure set theory.

      The result sequent is associated to the formula factory obtained from the original sequent after all operator and datatype extensions have been removed.

      The WD-strict operators are translated to functions, the datatype definitions are expanded. Any predicate containing a non WD-strict operator is simply removed (hypotheses become true, and the goal becomes false).

      Parameters:
      sequent - sequent to translate
      Returns:
      a sequent stronger than the given one, where all operators and datatypes have been translated to pure set theory or removed if untranslatable
      Since:
      3.1

    • isDatatype

      private static boolean isDatatype(IFormulaExtension ext)

    • isTypeConstructor

      private static boolean isTypeConstructor(IFormulaExtension ext)
